title: schefflera hoi
intro: Schefflera hoi, also known as the Taiwan umbrella tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Araliaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Schefflera hoi include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, Schefflera hoi is often used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
